question.text: Contango market with weakening basis (e.g., basis going from -200 to -250) benefits:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Weakening basis (more negative) means futures are gaining relative to spot. This benefits long hedgers (long futures position gains more). **The Trap:** Strengthening basis benefits short hedgers. The table shows: Contango/Weakening → benefits long hedger. Contango/Strengthening → benefits short hedger. **Cross-Exam Context:** Basis-hedger benefit matrix is specific to commodity derivatives. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Processors (long hedgers) benefit when futures rise faster than spot — their futures position gains exceed their spot market purchase cost increase.
